errorCode.msg: Error has occurred in BankSign certificate transaction.
This IP/MAC is registered on IP/MAC blacklist, thus its access to SCBK internet banking is restricted. (Please contact customer center 1588-1599 for any inquires.)
You can login with your cerficiate after you have registered for Mobile Banking.
Identification failed. Logged-in user and certificate-submitted user are different.
Abnormal HDD value.
Abnormal HDD value
Please subscribe to keyboard banking from mobile banking app. \n (Service and setting) > Simple service setting > Register for keyboard banking
To use keyboard banking service, go to mobile banking Service and setting > Simple service setting > Subscribe/cancel keyboard banking > Keyboard banking setting.
This IP is subject to overseas IP block thus access to SCBK keyboard banking is restricted.(Please contact customer center 1588-1599 for any inquires.)
Sorry, we are unable to process your request at this time. Please try again later.
Failed ARS authentication.
Password cannot be reset in Breeze Banking. Please use internet banking for password reset.
Customer name does not match.
You are currently logged out since log-in from other PC/Mobile is detected. If this is not deemed normal, please contact the customer center(1588-1599).

This menu requires log in.
Do you want to go to log-in page?
Incorrect new password.
Error has occurred while logging in to BankSign.
Failed bio-authentication. [TR{0} {1} ({2} {3})]
There was an error occurred while processing duplicate login.
Update to the latest version of SC mobile banking application.
Invalid log-in request. Please try again.
An error occurred during fintech certificate transaction.
